section.title: Step 1: uv init
section.p: Action: Run uv init; choose Python version.

section.title: Step 3: Sync target-versions
section.p: Action: Set requires-python, ruff target-version, mypy python_version to match.
Output: All four pins in sync.

section.title: Step 4: Adopt PEP 695
section.p: Action: Rewrite TypeVar usages to def f[T]/class C[T].

section.title: Step 5: Decide free-threaded
section.p: Action: If CPU-bound + pure Python → consider 3.13t; else stay GIL.
